source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One face-free yo-yo hangs at a slight three-quarter angle beneath a looping string. All body rings, string paths, panel shapes, motion marks, and color areas are established before the final panel.

process_strategy: The contact sheet fixes one two-disc yo-yo envelope and central axle, adds the looping string from that axle, develops simple inset rings and rim panels, introduces directional motion arcs, then inks and colors only established shapes before a final cleanup pass.

final_elements.name: two-disc yo-yo envelope and axle guide
final_elements.description: Two light offset round discs form a chunky three-quarter yo-yo with a small centered axle gap.

final_elements.name: rounded yo-yo silhouette and center groove
final_elements.description: A bold readable toy silhouette with two softly rounded rims and a clear narrow groove between them.

final_elements.name: looping string and top finger loop
final_elements.description: One cord emerges from the established axle, sweeps upward in a loose S-shaped loop, and ends in a small open finger loop with no hand.

final_elements.name: inset rings, alternating rim panels, and motion arcs
final_elements.description: Simple nested rings and chunky alternating panels decorate the existing discs while three curved motion arcs reinforce the downward swing.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with magenta, cyan, and yellow marker fills
final_elements.description: Bold marker reinforces the established toy and string, with saturated magenta and cyan rim panels, a yellow center, and visible handmade fill streaks.

frames.visible_job: Places two light offset round disc guides and one centered axle gap at a slight three-quarter angle.
introduces: two-disc yo-yo envelope and axle guide

frames.visible_job: Builds the rounded two-disc silhouette and clear center groove around the established guides.
introduces: rounded yo-yo silhouette and center groove
requires_prior_elements: two-disc yo-yo envelope and axle guide

frames.visible_job: Runs one cord from the established axle into a loose upward S-curve and finishes with a small open finger loop.
introduces: looping string and top finger loop
requires_prior_elements: rounded yo-yo silhouette and center groove

frames.visible_job: Adds inset rings and alternating rim panels to the existing discs, then places three curved motion arcs beside the existing swing path.
introduces: inset rings, alternating rim panels, and motion arcs
requires_prior_elements: rounded yo-yo silhouette and center groove
looping string and top finger loop

frames.visible_job: Thickens established contours and fills the existing rim panels and center with magenta, cyan, and yellow marker.
introduces: thick black outline with magenta, cyan, and yellow marker fills
requires_prior_elements: rounded yo-yo silhouette and center groove
looping string and top finger loop
inset rings, alternating rim panels, and motion arcs

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established outlines, string curves, rim panels, motion arcs, and marker fills.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established discs

rejection_checks: No disc, axle, center groove, string segment, finger loop, ring, rim panel, motion arc, outline, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
The yo-yo must retain one angle, disc spacing, string path, scale, and crop across all six panels.
The string must connect visibly to the established center axle and remain a single continuous cord.
Reject a face, hand, lettering, sticker border, badge frame, glossy vector icon treatment, fake 3D render, or extra toys.
